items.title: Good news for the Sparks: they’re 7-for-11 inside the paint.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt:
Good news for the Sparks: they’re 7-for-11 inside the paint.

Bad news for the Sparks: they’re 4-for-16 outside of it, have 8 turnovers, and gave up a 19-3 run.

They trail the Sky 38-29.

items.title: A monster first quarter for the Fever, up 37-26 after v Storm. Kelsey Mitchell, the conference player of the week last week, erupted for 17 (on 7/9 shooting).
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
A monster first quarter for the Fever, up 37-26 after v Storm. Kelsey Mitchell, the conference player of the week last week, erupted for 17 (on 7/9 shooting).

Notable, too: Makayla Timpson, starting for Boston, grabbed 5rebs in 8mins.

items.title: End Q1 | Sparks 17, Sky 16 | Los Angeles shot 44% and held Chicago to 35% shooting. Sparks did turn the ball over 5 times. Nneka Ogwumike’s 5 points lead Los Angeles while Erica Wheeler and Dearica Hamby each have 4. Azurá Stevens paces Chicago with 6 points.

items.author: Howard Megdal
items.body_excerpt:
I hope you all spend some time with this. I spent the week talking to people throughout the #WNBA ecosystem about what is working, what isn’t and how to fix it.
There aren’t any simple solutions, but there are a ways to make this better that require buy-in from everyone. @theixsports.bsky.social

items.title: With Aliyah Boston out, Clark and Mitchell have been a dynamic duo to start. 11pts from Mitchell, 5asts from Clark already.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
With Aliyah Boston out, Clark and Mitchell have been a dynamic duo to start. 11pts from Mitchell, 5asts from Clark already.

A 24-16 start for Indiana. Storm concluding a five-game road trip in Indy.

items.title: My position going back to last summer before we even knew who was buying the team has been "The new owner will probably try to extort the city for arena money via threat of relocation, and the city will give them the money in the end." Still believe that will be how this goes.
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt: My position going back to last summer before we even knew who was buying the team has been "The new owner will probably try to extort the city for arena money via threat of relocation, and the city will give them the money in the end." Still believe that will be how this goes.

items.title: NEW FEATURE: In an alternate world, Amile Jefferson is still in the NBA. In his last-ever game as a pro, he tallied 20 points & 15 rebounds.
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW FEATURE: In an alternate world, Amile Jefferson is still in the NBA. In his last-ever game as a pro, he tallied 20 points & 15 rebounds.

But Jefferson picked coaching, and the Celtics' are the biggest beneficiaries. 

“You can tell he’s a winner." 
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: Amile Jefferson ditched NBA dreams for the coaching world — and the Celtics are the real winners
media.description: Amile Jefferson has pushed all the right buttons as the Celtics’ Summer League head coach. He’s exactly where he’s supposed to be.
